untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of confluence between weekly and intraday pivot levels (R1, R2, R3 overlapping across timeframes) and sequential breakout through all three levels. The allowed indicators only provide single-timeframe pivot data (pivot, r1, r2, s1, s2) without multi-timeframe confluence logic or the ability to compare intraday vs weekly pivots. Sequential level breakout logic cannot be expressed with simple 3-field conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using available pivot and moving average indicators. Entry condition simplified to: r1 == r2 (partial confluence proxy), close crosses above r2 (resistance breakout), and close above sma_200 (trend confirmation). Exit uses sma_200 crossbelow as reversal signal. A full translation would require custom multi-timeframe pivot confluence functions not available in the allowed indicator set.
